creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

All lua framework on ports has version on filenames, binaries, manpages, 
docs, so i cannot remove the version from manpages. Anyway, this naming 
doesn't make impossible to use man, remember the last digit is the man 
category, so, try to run "man lua-5.1" and it'll work fine
